creator: debdrup@freebsd.org
text:
Near as I can tell, the facility for automatically generating what would end up as https://www-legacy.freebsd.org/ports/audio.html was lost in the AsciiDoctor transistion.

It seems to me like it was accomplished by doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/htdocs/ports/Makefile using ./categories, based on https://svnweb.freebsd.org/doc/head/en_US.ISO8859-1/htdocs/ports/Makefile.inc?revision=47265&view=markup#l15

As such, this seems like it should go over to carlavilla@.
